steps.title: Cancel the common factor
steps.content:
Both sides of the equation have a factor of $38$, so divide both sides by $38$.
$$38x^2=38(9)$$
$$x^2=9$$

steps.title: Find both roots
steps.content:
An equation of the form $x^2=9$ has two solutions.
$$x=3$$
$$x=-3$$
The negative solution is requested. The answer is -3.
